<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />

<style>
/* ==================== CONFIG GENERAL ==================== */
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #1f2937;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background: #ffffff;
}

/* ==================== IMPRESIÓN - HORIZONTAL ==================== */
@page {
  size: A4 landscape;  /* ← ORIENTACIÓN HORIZONTAL */
  margin: 10mm 8mm;
}

@media print {
  body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  /* Evitar cortes de elementos EXCEPTO la sección del cronograma */
  .section:not(.cronograma-section),
  .data-grid,
  .firmas {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }

  /* La sección del cronograma SÍ puede dividirse entre páginas */
  .cronograma-section {
    page-break-inside: auto;
  }

  /* Filas de tabla - evitar cortes */
  tr {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    page-break-after: auto;
  }

  /* Header de tabla se repite */
  thead {
    display: table-header-group;
  }

  /* Footer de tabla */
  tfoot {
    display: table-footer-group;
  }

  /* Grupos de servicio no se separan del primer equipo */
  .grupo-row {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    page-break-after: avoid;
  }

  .grupo-row + tr {
    page-break-before: avoid;
  }

  /* Firmas solo si hay espacio, sino nueva página */
  .firmas {
    page-break-before: auto;
    margin-top: 30px;
  }

  /* El header principal solo en primera página */
  .main-header {
    page-break-after: avoid;
  }
}

/* ==================== CONTENEDOR ==================== */
.page {
  padding: 15px;
  background: #ffffff;
}

/* ==================== TABLA ENVOLVENTE PARA REPETIR HEADER ==================== */
table.page-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

table.page-wrapper thead {
  display: table-header-group; /* Se repite en cada página */
}

table.page-wrapper tbody {
  display: table-row-group;
}

table.page-wrapper td {
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
  vertical-align: top;
}

/* ==================== HEADER PRINCIPAL ==================== */
.main-header {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.header-table {
  width: 100%;
  table-layout: fixed;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.header-table td {
  border: none;
  padding: 5px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.logo img {
  height: 50px;
  max-width: 100%;
}

.header-info {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 10px;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

/* ==================== SECCIONES ==================== */
.section {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.section-header {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0b5ed7, #3b82f6);
  color: white;
  padding: 5px 10px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.section-header .title {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 12px;
}

/* ==================== INFO CLIENTE ==================== */
.data-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); /* 4 columnas en horizontal */
  gap: 4px 12px;
}

.data-item {
  font-size: 10px;
}

.data-item strong {
  color: #0b5ed7;
}

/* ==================== TABLAS ==================== */
table.cronograma {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 8px;  /* Más pequeño para horizontal */
  table-layout: fixed;
}

table.cronograma th,
table.cronograma td {
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  padding: 3px 2px;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

table.cronograma th {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 8px;
}

/* Anchos específicos para columnas - AJUSTADOS PARA HORIZONTAL */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(1),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(1) { width: 8%; } /* Equipo */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(2),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(2) { width: 6%; } /* Marca */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(3),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(3) { width: 6%; } /* Modelo */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(4),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(4) { width: 6%; } /* Serial */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(5),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(5) { width: 5%; } /* Inventario */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(6),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(6) { width: 7%; } /* Ubicación */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(7),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(7) { width: 4%; } /* Riesgo */
table.cronograma th:nth-child(8),
table.cronograma td:nth-child(8) { width: 6%; } /* Reg. INVIMA */
/* Los 12 meses se reparten el resto del espacio */

/* Grupo de servicio */
.grupo-row td {
  background: #e5e7eb;
  font-weight: bold;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 9px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
}

/* ==================== MESES ==================== */
.mes-ok {
  background: #16a34a;
  color: white;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* ==================== FIRMAS ==================== */
.firmas {
  margin-top: 30px;
}

.firmas table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.firmas table td {
  border: none;
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.firma-linea {
  height: 50px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #9ca3af;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

/* ==================== UTILIDADES ==================== */
.text-center {
  text-align: center;
}

.text-left {
  text-align: left;
}

.text-right {
  text-align: right;
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<div class="page">

  <!-- ===================== TABLA ENVOLVENTE PARA REPETIR HEADER ===================== -->
  <table class="page-wrapper">
    
    <!-- HEADER QUE SE REPITE EN CADA PÁGINA -->
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <td>
          <div class="main-header">
            <table class="header-table">
              <tr>
                <td style="width:20%; text-align:left;">
                  <div class="logo">
                    <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:130px;height:auto;object-fit:contain;border-radius:8px;" />
                  </div>
                </td>

                <td style="width:60%; text-align:center;">
                  <div class="header-info">
                    <strong>BIOLMEC SAS</strong><br>
                    900221358-4<br><br>
                    <strong>
                      Cronograma de Mantenimiento General
                    </strong>
                  </div>
                </td>

                <td style="width:20%; text-align:right;">
                  <div class="logo">
                    <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:130px;height:auto;object-fit:contain;border-radius:8px;" />
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            </table>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>
    </thead>

    <!-- CONTENIDO QUE CONTINÚA EN CADA PÁGINA -->
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>

  <!-- ===================== INFO CLIENTE ===================== -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="title">Información del Cliente</span>
    </div>
    <div class="data-grid">
              <div class="data-item"><strong>Cliente:</strong> Clinica Ser Salud</div>
        <div class="data-item"><strong>NIT:</strong> 900419208</div>
        <div class="data-item"><strong>Ciudad:</strong> Sincé</div>
        <div class="data-item"><strong>Teléfono:</strong> 3223334455</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===================== CRONOGRAMA ===================== -->
  <div class="section cronograma-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="title">Cronograma de Mantenimiento</span>
    </div>

    <table class="cronograma">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th rowspan="2">Equipo</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Marca</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Modelo</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Serial</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Inventario</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Ubicación</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Riesgo</th>
          <th rowspan="2">Reg. INVIMA</th>
          <th colspan="12">Meses</th>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <th>ENE</th><th>FEB</th><th>MAR</th><th>ABR</th>
          <th>MAY</th><th>JUN</th><th>JUL</th><th>AGO</th>
          <th>SEP</th><th>OCT</th><th>NOV</th><th>DIC</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>

      <tbody>
        <tr>
  <td colspan="20" class="grupo">
    Servicio / Sede: Procedimientos QX | Principal
  </td>
</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Ventilador Mecánico</td>
  <td>Somed</td>
  <td>Vt-MedPlus</td>
  <td>Jh786565</td>
  <td>No presenta</td>
  <td>QX 1</td>
  <td></td>
  <td></td>

<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >   </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>

</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Monitor de Signos Vitales Básico</td>
  <td>Edan</td>
  <td>X8</td>
  <td>X8768756</td>
  <td>Jh8787</td>
  <td>Qx 1</td>
  <td></td>
  <td></td>

<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >   </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>
<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >  </td>
<td >  </td>

</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Desfibrilador</td>
  <td>Edan</td>
  <td>SonoE</td>
  <td>654755</td>
  <td>34</td>
  <td>Sala de parto</td>
  <td></td>
  <td></td>

<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >   </td>

</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Ventilador Mecánico</td>
  <td>edan</td>
  <td>m67</td>
  <td>6567</td>
  <td>54</td>
  <td>UCI</td>
  <td></td>
  <td></td>

<td class="mes-ok">  ✔</td>
<td >   </td>

<td >  </td>

</tr>
<tr>
  <td>Desfibrilador</td>
  <td>Mindray</td>
  <td>Benehearth D3</td>
  <td>5232653</td>
  <td>254121</td>
  <td>Cirugia</td>

</tr>

  <td>Mindray</td>
  <td>mec1200</td>
  <td>M124521</td>
  <td>12</td>

  </div>

  <!-- ===================== FIRMAS ===================== -->
  <div class="firmas">
    <table>
      <tr>
        <td style="width:50%;">
          <div class="firma-linea"></div>
          <strong>Nombre del Técnico</strong><br>
          Cargo: Técnico Biomédico<br>
          Registro Sanitario: XXXXX
        </td>

        <td style="width:50%;">
          <div class="firma-linea"></div>
          <strong>Responsable del Cliente</strong><br>
          Cargo<br>
          Firma y sello
        </td>
      </tr>
    </table>
  </div>

        </td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
  <!-- FIN TABLA ENVOLVENTE -->

</div>

</body>
</html>
